PC App only (comes with development soon.Message: Run the setup.bat file first, it will tell you what to do next!

Install Tablet APK.Message: Open the intall_apk.bat in the tablet_apk folder and follow the instructions.

Just the APK.Message: Move the app.apk into the tablet and then open it to install the app.

Unlock Tablet.Message: Open the Unlock_Tablet.bat in the tablet_unlock folder and follow the instructions.

Development with the APK.Message: Go inside the Development folder and you should find the source code for the android 2.3.4 apk app.
